name: ndh-aed-prediction
description: NDH AED 病人數量預測系統 v5.4.00 — World-class accuracy: 84-feature pipeline (weather + CHP flu surveillance + school terms + AI factor + holiday-context + year-over-year), Optuna-tuned XGBoost, N-BEATS global anchor, Conformalized Quantile Regression CI with online calibration, capped bias correction with auto-fallback. Honest walk-forward MAE 14.40 / MAPE 6.26% on Railway DB (4186 days), down from v5.0.00 MAE 17.94 (−19.7%).

scripts.postinstall: node scripts/install-python-deps.js || echo 'Python dependencies installation skipped'

author: Ma Tsz Kiu
